asm1model
=========

Compiled extension package for ASM1 unit models.

Quick import
------------

.. code-block:: python

   from asm1model import asm1, combiner, carboncombiner, hyddelay, settler1d

Contents
--------

   :maxdepth: 1
   :caption: Documentation

   api
   examples
   acknowledgement
   citation_license_contact
